title: solenostemon bernieri
intro: Solenostemon bernieri, also known as Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Solenostemon bernieri is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparation of the plant is often made into a tea or used topically as a poultice, and can be found in some traditional African medicine practices.
